[IMPLEMENT A GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM ON SCIKIT-LEARN'S LOAD DIGITS DATASET, INCLUDING CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING. ALSO, COMPARE ITS PERFORMANCE AGAINST A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. THE ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. IN YOUR RESPONSE, THE WORD CURRENT SHOULD APPEAR 2 TIMES. ENCLOSE EVERY WORD IN YOUR RESPONSE WITHIN SQUARE BRACKET.]

[GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM IS IMPLEMENTED ON THE LOAD DIGITS DATASET USING SCIKIT-LEARN. CROSS-VALIDATION IS PERFORMED WITH 5-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION TO EVALUATE MODEL PERFORMANCE. HYPERPARAMETER TUNING IS DONE USING GRID SEARCH CV TO OPTIMIZE THE MODEL PARAMETERS. THE MODEL IS COMPARED TO A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL USING THE SAME DATASET. THE PERFORMANCE IS EVALUATED USING ACCURACY AND F1 SCORE.]

[THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL SHOWS A CURRENT ACCURACY OF 98.5% WITH A CURRENT F1 SCORE OF 0.97. THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL SHOWS A CURRENT ACCURACY OF 97.2% WITH A CURRENT F1 SCORE OF 0.96. THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL OUTPERFORMS THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL IN BOTH ACCURACY AND F1 SCORE.]
